tagline.cn: 现场调音 / 系统工程 / 混音后期

description.cn: 了解项目类型、时间安排、场地或混音目标，确认合作范围。
description.en: Clarify project type, schedule, venue or mix goals, and scope of work.

title.cn: 判断现场 / 素材情况

description.cn: 评估现场条件、设备清单，或混音素材与参考方向。
description.en: Review venue conditions and gear, or mix stems and references.

description.cn: 明确系统调试、现场调音或后期混音的执行重点与交付标准。
description.en: Define priorities for system tuning, live mixing or post-production, and deliverables.

title.cn: 执行调试 / 混音制作

description.cn: 现场系统调试、演出混音，或录音后期编辑与混音制作。
description.en: On-site system tuning and live mixing, or editing and mix production.

description.cn: 交付成果，整理问题记录，并给出后续优化建议。
description.en: Deliver results, document issues, and share follow-up suggestions.

description.cn: 可能与频段遮蔽、话筒增益、主扩覆盖或房间反射有关。
description.en: Often linked to masking, mic gain, PA coverage or room reflections.

description.cn: 可能与话筒位置、监听摆位、增益结构或房间反射有关。
description.en: Mic placement, monitor aim, gain structure or reflections may contribute.

description.cn: 可能与房间驻波、超低摆位、相位耦合或 EQ 策略有关。
description.en: Room modes, sub placement, phase coupling or EQ strategy are common factors.

description.cn: 可能与高频过量、失真、压缩过猛或音箱指向有关。
description.en: Excess highs, distortion, over-compression or speaker aim may be involved.

description.cn: 可能与音箱角度、高度、延时补声或系统设计有关。
description.en: Speaker aim, height, delay fills or system design often play a role.

description.cn: 可能与返听混音、舞台声压、话筒串扰或监听路由有关。
description.en: Monitor mix, stage SPL, mic bleed or monitor routing may be unclear.

description.cn: 可能与信号链路规划、接口标准、多设备并联或标记不清有关。
description.en: Signal-path planning, connectors, multi-device patching or unclear labeling.

description.cn: 可能与前级电平、台面推子、处理器压限或系统校准有关。
description.en: Preamps, console faders, processor limiting or system calibration may drift.

title.cn: 现场调音师 / 音响系统工程师 / 混音师
title.en: Live Sound Engineer / System Tuning / Mixing Engineer

bio.cn:
余雅康，dBsource 音响系统工程师，中国录音师协会会员，录音技术专业背景，持有初级录音师、华汇 DiGiCo 高级技术培训与 VOS 音响系统工程师认证。工作内容覆盖现场扩声、系统测量调试、FOH / Monitor / OB 调音、录音、音频编辑与后期混音。

我理解声音从制作到现场扩声的完整流程：从前期编写、录音制式选择、麦克风摆位、前级与音频接口连接，到后期修唱、编辑、混音处理，再到现场系统搭建、处理器调试、监听分配与前场扩声控制。
bio.en:
Yu Yakang is a dBsource sound system engineer and a member of the China Recording Engineers Association, with a recording technology background. He holds Junior Recording Engineer, Huahui DiGiCo Advanced Technical Training, and VOS Sound System Engineer certifications. His work covers live reinforcement, system measurement and tuning, FOH / Monitor / OB mixing, recording, audio editing and post-production mixing.

He works across the full path from production to live sound: arrangement and capture choices, microphone placement, preamps and interfaces, editing and mixing, through to system setup, processor tuning, monitor allocation and FOH control.

summary.cn: 与罗维老师共同完成 ECHO.回声 Live 的场地系统工程调试，整体系统围绕 Live 演出场景进行设计、搭建和优化。
summary.en: Venue system engineering and tuning for ECHO Live Yunfu, designed and optimized for live performance scenarios.

background.cn: ECHO.回声 Live 是云浮地区的 Live 音乐空间，需要满足多类型演出的扩声需求。
background.en: ECHO Live Yunfu is a live music venue serving diverse performance formats.

equipment.cn: dBsource DO115H、DO112、DO110、DO218S、Behringer WING Compact、Smaart/VOS 测量、延时对齐、相位检查、低频阵列。
equipment.en: dBsource DO115H, DO112, DO110, DO218S, Behringer WING Compact, Smaart/VOS, delay, phase, sub array.

challenge.cn: Live 音乐空间需要同时满足人声清晰度、乐队动态、低频能量、声压储备和不同区域覆盖一致性。存在多楼层、多补声区域和超低系统衔接问题。
challenge.en: The venue required vocal clarity, band dynamics, controlled LF, headroom and consistent coverage across multiple levels and fill zones.

solution.cn: 主扩采用 dBsource DO115H；二楼补声采用 DO112 与 DO110；超低系统采用 DO218S 弧形阵列布局。调试中对主扩、补声、超低进行耦合校准、延时对齐和相位检查。调音台使用 Behringer WING Compact。
solution.en: Main PA used DO115H; second-floor fills used DO112/DO110; subs used DO218S arc array. Coupling, delay and phase alignment were verified. Console: Behringer WING Compact.

result.cn: 系统在不同听音区域保持更自然、更统一的声音表现，低频既有力量感也具备控制力，提升了 Live 场地整体声音完成度。
result.en: The system delivered more natural, unified coverage with controlled yet powerful low end across listening zones.

title.cn: 云浮 ECHO.回声 Live | YU YAKANG AUDIO
title.en: ECHO Live Yunfu | YU YAKANG AUDIO

role.cn: 场地音响系统改造与现场调音

summary.cn: 小型 Live 场地音响系统改造与现场调音，重点优化覆盖、低频控制与 PA / Monitor 工作流。
summary.en: Compact live-venue PA upgrade and live mixing, focused on coverage, LF control and PA / Monitor workflow.

background.cn:
深圳市南山区 Wild Live 场地音响系统改造与现场调音案例分享

本次案例为深圳市南山区 Wild Live 的场地音响系统改造优化、系统调试以及现场乐队调音项目。该场地面积约 200 平方米左右，原系统使用的是 EV 音响，且未配置专业音频处理器。为了提升场地整体扩声表现、覆盖均匀度以及系统可控性，本次对主扩、返听以及系统处理部分进行了重新规划与升级。

本次改造中，主扩与返听系统均更换为 dBsource 双 6.5 寸小尺寸点声源音箱，并新增一台 dBsource UNIT48 处理器，系统架构为 4 进 8 出。整体配置包括主扩 2 只、前补 2 只、后补 2 只、返听 2 只，通过处理器对不同区域进行独立管理和优化。

在音箱系统设计中，很多问题都应该尽量在前级规划阶段解决，而不是等到后期调试时再依靠 EQ 或动态处理进行被动修正。因此，在前期方案设计时，我们根据场地面积、空间结构以及 Live 演出需求，对可能出现的声学问题进行了预估。
background.en:
Wild Live (Nanshan, Shenzhen) — venue PA upgrade and live band mixing.

This project covered system redesign, measurement-based tuning and live band mixing for Wild Live in Nanshan, Shenzhen. The room is about 200㎡. The previous system used EV loudspeakers without a dedicated loudspeaker processor. To improve coverage uniformity, system control and overall reinforcement quality, mains, monitors and processing were re-planned and upgraded.

Mains and monitors were replaced with dBsource dual 6.5" compact point-source loudspeakers, with a new dBsource UNIT48 processor in a 4-in / 8-out architecture: 2 mains, 2 front fills, 2 rear fills and 2 stage monitors, each zone managed independently.

Many loudspeaker-system problems should be solved in planning rather than corrected later with EQ and dynamics. Early design therefore estimated acoustic risks based on room size, layout and live-performance needs.

services.cn: 系统改造 / 测量调试 / 现场乐队调音
services.en: System upgrade / Measurement and tuning / Live band mixing

equipment.cn: dBsource 双 6.5 寸点声源音箱（主扩 2 / 前补 2 / 后补 2 / 返听 2）、dBsource UNIT48 处理器（4 进 8 出）、Behringer WING RACK、Double Patch、声学模拟、系统测量调试。
equipment.en: dBsource dual 6.5" point-source (2 mains / 2 front fills / 2 rear fills / 2 monitors), dBsource UNIT48 (4x8), Behringer WING RACK, Double Patch, acoustic simulation, measurement-based tuning.

challenge.cn:
对于 200 平方米左右的小型 Live 空间来说，低频驻波和低频反射往往是比较明显的声学困扰。如果系统本身低频能量过多，很容易造成声音浑浊、局部轰鸣、低频拖尾以及乐器层次不清晰等问题。因此，本次系统选择了小尺寸点声源音箱作为主要扩声方案，在满足声压和覆盖需求的同时，尽量减少不必要的低频能量激发，让整个场地的声音更加干净、清晰、可控。

小尺寸点声源音箱的优势在于覆盖灵活、声音集中、调试效率高，也更适合这类面积不大、声学条件相对复杂的 Live 场地。相比单纯追求大尺寸和大声压，这种方案更注重实际听感、系统稳定性以及场地适配度，同时也是一个兼顾效果与成本的经济型改造方案。
challenge.en:
In a ~200㎡ live room, LF standing waves and reflections are common. Excess low-frequency energy easily causes muddiness, boom, LF hang and unclear instrument layers. Compact point-source loudspeakers were chosen to meet level and coverage needs while limiting unnecessary LF excitation, keeping the room cleaner and more controllable.

Compact point-source systems offer flexible coverage, focused imaging and efficient tuning for smaller, acoustically complex live rooms. Rather than chasing cabinet size and raw SPL alone, this approach prioritizes listening quality, stability, venue fit and a practical cost-performance balance.

solution.cn:
在前期规划阶段，我们结合声学模拟和现场空间结构，对音箱数量、摆位、覆盖角度以及补声区域进行了提前计算和安排。通过主扩、前补、后补之间的合理配合，让观众区不同位置都能获得相对均匀的声音覆盖，减少前排过大、后区不足或局部声音脱节的问题。

在系统搭建与测量调试过程中，测量话筒尽量升高摆放，减少地面反射对测量结果造成的干扰，从而提升测量数据的准确性和参考价值。随后通过处理器对主扩、前补、后补、返听等不同输出进行独立管理，包括分频、均衡、延时、限幅以及各区域之间的能量比例调整。

本次调音台使用的是 Behringer WING RACK，系统采用 PA 与 Monitor 一体化的工作方式。通过 Double Patch 的方式，对观众区扩声、舞台乐手监听、歌手监听以及对讲系统进行更加独立、精细的控制，让同一套调音系统可以同时满足前场扩声与舞台监听的需求。

在现场乐队调音部分，重点围绕人声清晰度、乐器层次、低频控制和舞台监听稳定性进行处理。Live 场地的调音不能只追求单个通道好听，更重要的是让鼓、贝斯、吉他、键盘、人声之间形成合理的比例关系，让观众区听到的声音既有能量，也保持清晰度和音乐性。
solution.en:
Planning combined acoustic simulation with the room layout to set loudspeaker count, placement, coverage angles and fill zones. Coordinated mains, front fills and rear fills improved audience coverage uniformity and reduced front-heavy / rear-weak or disconnected zones.

During install and measurement, mics were raised to reduce floor-reflection contamination. The processor then managed mains, fills and monitors independently — crossover, EQ, delay, limiting and zone energy balance.

The console was a Behringer WING RACK with an integrated PA / Monitor workflow. Double Patch enabled finer independent control of FOH, band monitors, vocal monitors and talkback on one system.

Live band mixing focused on vocal clarity, instrument layering, LF control and stable stage monitoring — balancing drums, bass, guitars, keys and vocals so the audience hears energy with clarity and musicality.

result.cn:
整体来看，本次 Wild Live 的系统改造并不是简单更换设备，而是从场地声学、系统架构、覆盖方式、低频控制、处理器管理、PA 与 Monitor 工作流以及现场乐队调音等多个角度进行综合优化。

一个好的 Live 场地系统，核心不是单纯追求更大的声压，而是要让声音在不同位置都足够稳定、清晰、均匀，并且能够适应不同类型的演出需求。设备只是基础，系统设计、测量调试和现场判断，才是最终决定听感的重要环节。
result.en:
Overall, this Wild Live upgrade was not a simple gear swap. It combined room acoustics, system architecture, coverage strategy, LF control, processor management, PA / Monitor workflow and live band mixing.

A strong live-venue system is not defined by maximum SPL alone, but by stable, clear and even sound across the room for varied shows. Equipment is the foundation; design, measurement and on-site judgment shape the final listening experience.

title.cn: 深圳南山 Wild Live 场地音响系统改造与现场调音 | YU YAKANG AUDIO
title.en: Wild Live Shenzhen — Venue PA Upgrade and Live Mixing | YU YAKANG AUDIO

description.cn: 小型 Live 场地音响系统改造与现场调音，重点优化覆盖、低频控制与 PA / Monitor 工作流。
description.en: Compact live-venue PA upgrade and live mixing focused on coverage, LF control and PA / Monitor workflow.

role.cn: 现场扩声系统搭建与调试

title.cn: 肇庆广宁 Maca 音乐客厅 Live

summary.cn: Maca 音乐客厅 Live 扩声系统搭建与调试，围绕中小型音乐空间的清晰度、覆盖均匀度、低频控制和长期稳定运营进行系统优化。
summary.en: Live sound system setup and tuning for Maca Music Living Room, optimizing clarity, coverage, low-frequency control and long-term reliability.

background.cn: Maca 音乐客厅是以 live 演出、音乐交流和现场氛围为核心的音乐空间。
background.en: Maca Music Living Room is a venue focused on live performances, music community and on-site atmosphere.

equipment.cn: dBsource DO 系列点声源音箱、DO218S 超低音箱、206M 监听音箱、系统处理器、限幅设置、EQ、延时、增益架构。
equipment.en: dBsource DO series, DO218S subs, 206M monitors, system processor, limiting, EQ, delay, gain structure.

challenge.cn: 需要在有限空间内兼顾人声清晰度、乐器层次、低频包围感和不同观众区域的一致听感，同时系统也需要具备稳定、安全、易用的长期运营能力。
challenge.en: The venue needed vocal clarity, instrument separation, controlled low end and consistent coverage across seating areas, with reliable long-term operation.

solution.cn: FOH 主扩及补声采用 dBsource DO 系列点声源音箱；低频系统采用 DO218S 超低；舞台监听使用 206M。调试过程中对每一路通道进行了精准限幅设置，提高系统安全性与稳定性。
solution.en: FOH and fills used dBsource DO series point-source loudspeakers; subs used DO218S; monitors used 206M. Precise limiting was applied on every channel for safety and stability.

result.cn: 整套系统围绕「好听、耐听、稳定、易用」完成搭建与优化，在保证声音清晰度和低频能量的同时，也提升了场地后续运营的可靠性。
result.en: The system was tuned for musicality, stability and ease of use, improving clarity, LF energy and operational reliability.

title.cn: Maca 音乐客厅 Live | YU YAKANG AUDIO

title.cn: 南昌师范学院毕业晚会

summary.cn: 担任南昌师范学院毕业晚会现场调音师，负责整场晚会扩声调音与现场声音控制。
summary.en: FOH engineer for NCNU graduation gala, responsible for live sound reinforcement and on-site audio control.

background.cn: 大型院校毕业晚会，演出形式以管弦乐与综合文艺节目为主。
background.en: A large-scale university graduation gala featuring orchestral and mixed performance formats.

challenge.cn: Behringer X32 现场输入通道全部插满，对通道管理、增益结构、编组控制和现场应变能力要求较高。管弦乐扩声更注重声部层次、整体动态和自然听感。
challenge.en: Full X32 channel count demanded rigorous gain structure, grouping and scene management. Orchestral reinforcement required natural dynamics and sectional balance.

solution.cn: 演出前期完成通道命名、DCA 编组、Mute Group 和场景管理。对弦乐、木管、铜管、打击乐等声部进行合理规划，通过增益、声像、EQ 和动态控制保持层次并控制串扰。
solution.en: Pre-show channel naming, DCA groups, mute groups and scenes. Sectional planning for strings, woodwinds, brass and percussion with gain, pan, EQ and dynamics.

result.cn: 整场晚会声音更加稳定、清晰、自然，更好地服务演出情绪表达，也强化了大型晚会系统调音与音乐性处理经验。
result.en: The show delivered stable, clear and natural sound that supported the performance narrative and strengthened large-format FOH experience.

equipment.cn: Behringer X32、DCA 编组、Mute Group、场景管理、EQ、动态控制、管弦乐扩声、现场 FOH。
equipment.en: Behringer X32, DCA groups, mute groups, scenes, EQ, dynamics, orchestral FOH.
